context.goal: Change the document display zoom from 150% to 100% so the full slide fits more comfortably in the editor viewport.
context.cues: TIAEditor window showing a slide titled 'UNDERSTANDING MARKETING'; the page is zoomed in with content cropped at the bottom, and the top display manipulation toolbar shows slide 4/15 with a zoom percentage control set to 150%.

anchors.locator: top toolbar zoom percentage combo box currently showing '150 %'

procedure.expect: The zoom percentage control is activated for changing the current zoom value.
The slide view changes to 100% zoom; the zoom field shows '100 %' and the full marketing slide with all bullet points is visible within the page area.
